adverse_events.event_description:
/ Problem / Product Use Error (B.5) 
Patient experienced QT prolongation detected on ECG monitoring 3 days into treatment. Complained of 
palpitations and near-syncope. Drug was immediately discontinued.

/ Preexisting Medical Conditions (B.7) 
History of prolonged QT syndrome. Concurrent use of metoprolol.

adverse_events.event_description:
/ Problem / Product Use Error (B.5) 
Stevens-Johnson Syndrome developed 2 weeks after starting medication. Widespread skin blistering, mucosal 
involvement, and high fever (103°F). ICU admission required.

No prior drug allergies. HLA-B*1502 status unknown. On valproic acid concurrently.

/ Problem / Product Use Error (B.5) 
Rhabdomyolysis confirmed by elevated CPK. Patient presented with severe muscle pain, weakness, and dark 
urine after dose increase 3 weeks prior.

adverse_events.event_description:

Acute liver failure symptoms emerged 6 weeks after therapy initiation. Jaundice, abdominal pain, and significantly 
elevated liver enzymes noted. Liver biopsy showed drug-induced hepatic necrosis.

Slow acetylator. Social alcohol use. No prior liver disease.

adverse_events.event_description:
/ Problem / Product Use Error (B.5) 
Severe hypoglycemia episode requiring emergency glucagon administration. Blood glucose dropped to 28 mg/dL. 
Patient lost consciousness briefly.

Pulmonary fibrosis detected on high-resolution CT scan after 14 months of treatment. Persistent dry cough and 
progressive dyspnea reported for 3 months prior to imaging.

Cumulative bleomycin dose exceeded 400 units. Non-smoker. Prior radiation to chest.

adverse_events.event_description:
/ Problem / Product Use Error (B.5)

Serotonin syndrome developed after combining medications. Symptoms included agitation, diaphoresis,
myoclonus, and hyperthermia (104.2°F). ICU admitted.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting:
/ Preexisting Medical Conditions (B.7)

Concurrently prescribed sertraline 100mg for depression. History of opioid use disorder, in remission.

adverse_events.event_description:
/ Problem / Product Use Error (B.5)

Nephrogenic diabetes insipidus with severe polyuria (10+ L/day) and hypernatremia after 2 years of therapy.
Serum sodium peaked at 162 mEq/L.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting:
/ Preexisting Medical Conditions (B.7)

NSAIDs used concurrently (ibuprofen). Low-sodium diet recently started. No prior renal disease.

adverse_events.event_description:
/ Problem / Product Use Error (B.5)

Severe peripheral neuropathy with burning pain and numbness in bilateral lower extremities after 6 months of
therapy. EMG confirmed axonal neuropathy.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting:
/ Preexisting Medical Conditions (B.7)

CD4 count 320 cells/uL. Diabetic - confounds neuropathy risk. Alcohol use (social).

adverse_events.event_description:
/ Problem / Product Use Error (B.5)

Intracranial hemorrhage (subdural hematoma) after minor fall. On anticoagulation therapy. Neurosurgical
intervention required. Prolonged ICU stay.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting:
/ Preexisting Medical Conditions (B.7)

Fall risk due to orthostatic hypotension. Concurrent aspirin 81mg. Renal insufficiency (eGFR 28).

adverse_events.event_description:
/ Problem / Product Use Error (B.5)

Aplastic anemia confirmed after routine CBC showed pancytopenia. Bone marrow biopsy showed markedly
hypocellular marrow. Patient required transfusions and eventual stem cell transplant.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting:
/ Preexisting Medical Conditions (B.7)

Folate supplementation was NOT co-prescribed. Renal function borderline (CrCl 48). No NSAID use.

adverse_events.event_description:
/ Problem / Product Use Error (B.5)

Osteonecrosis of the jaw (ONJ) developed after dental extraction. Exposed necrotic bone in mandible confirmed on
CT. Surgical debridement required.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting:
/ Preexisting Medical Conditions (B.7)

Recent molar extraction 1 month prior. Corticosteroid use (prednisone). Vitamin D deficiency.

adverse_events.event_description:
/ Problem / Product Use Error (B.5)

Severe exfoliative dermatitis (toxic epidermal necrolysis — TEN) covering 40% body surface area. ICU admission,
wound care, IV fluids, pain management required.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting:
/ Preexisting Medical Conditions (B.7)

HLA-B*5801 positive (not checked prior to prescribing). Renal impairment — dose not adjusted.

adverse_events.event_description:
/ Problem / Product Use Error (B.5)

Agranulocytosis confirmed after presenting with fever, sore throat, and mouth ulcers. ANC dropped to 0.1 K/uL.
Hospitalized on reverse isolation for 11 days with IV antibiotics.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting:
/ Preexisting Medical Conditions (B.7)

Weekly CBC monitoring was being done per REMS protocol. No prior blood dyscrasias. Non-smoker.

adverse_events.event_description:
/ Problem / Product Use Error (B.5)

Refractory hypotension and shock developed 2 hours after IV infusion. Required vasopressors, fluid resuscitation,
and 3-day ICU stay. Suspected anaphylaxis.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting:
/ Preexisting Medical Conditions (B.7)

Premedication with acetaminophen and diphenhydramine was given. Renal impairment at baseline.

/ Preexisting Medical Conditions (B.7)

Pediatric patient under 18 — black box warning applicable. Family history of depression. No prior suicidal ideation.
